-- Cohomology substrate: sheaves of k-modules and the k-module structure sheaf.
import AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.SheafCompose
import AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.StructureSheafAb
import AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.StructureSheafModuleK
-- Genus and the P¹ base objects.
import AlgebraicJacobian.Genus
import AlgebraicJacobian.Genus0BaseObjects
-- Rigidity helper + the genus-0 curve / P¹ isomorphism target.
import AlgebraicJacobian.RigidityLemma
import AlgebraicJacobian.AbelianVarietyRigidity
import AlgebraicJacobian.Albanese.CoheightBridge
-- Riemann–Roch development (RR.1 – RR.4).
import AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.WeilDivisor
import AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.OcOfD
import AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.RRFormula
import AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.H1Vanishing
import AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.OCofP
import AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.RationalCurveIso
